name: InGamePlay
short_description: Immersive in-game ad SDK: clickable units, player-first design, and monetization for free-to-play developers and advertisers.
description: InGamePlay 3.0 builds on AdInMo's stack, with clickable in-game ad units designed with the player experience at the forefront, driving better monetization for free-to-play developers and higher engagement for advertisers.
